name: Extreme Limousine
recent_news: No public M&A, safety, or growth news found as of 2026.
fit_notes: Listed as 'limousine' operator in Yorba Linda CA; data record flags special-needs but no school/SPED contract found. Sub-scale (~6 employees, ~$365K rev) and appears to be limo/livery rather than school-bus operator. Low fit as a Summit tuck-in unless it holds California SPAB certification with district SPED contracts; would need direct outreach to verify.

name: Chair-To-There
recent_news: No public M&A, ownership, or news found as of 2026.
fit_notes: North Shore MA (Danvers) micro-operator listed in directories under school-bus, special-needs/handicapped, and airport categories. Likely independently owned given size (~5 employees, ~$325K). Could be a niche SPED/wheelchair-van tuck-in in Massachusetts where Summit/Durham has strong presence, but very small scale and unverified contracts make it a low-priority lead absent direct outreach.

name: D C Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public M&A or operating news found as of 2026.
fit_notes: Anderson Township-area (Cincinnati, OH 45244) micro-operator branded as a limousine service; record flags special-needs but no school/SPED contract surfaced. Owner Don Hart suggests founder/family-owned, possible succession candidate, but sub-scale (~5 employees, ~$315K) and apparent livery focus make this a low-priority Summit tuck-in absent confirmation of school/SPED business.

name: Trans Assist
recent_news: No public M&A, ownership, or news found as of 2026. Note: the Parma OH 'Transport Assistance' (trans-assist.com) is a SEPARATE NE Ohio NEMT/DODD operator and is NOT this Perrysburg entity.
fit_notes: NW Ohio (Perrysburg / Toledo metro) micro-operator with named president Dan Smith — possible owner-operator. Record flags special-needs only (no traditional yellow-bus). Sub-scale (~5 employees, ~$304K). Could be a small SPED/medical-van tuck-in in Toledo area but unverified; low priority absent direct contact confirming school district SPED contracts.

name: Taylor Transportation Svc
recent_news: No public M&A or ownership news found for the Arthington St entity as of 2026. Note: 'Taylor Services Transportation' (8610 S Stony Island, taylorservicestransportation.com, founded 1999, family-owned) is a SEPARATE Chicago school-transport operator and not confirmed to be the same business as the W. Arthington listing.
fit_notes: West Side Chicago (3835 W Arthington) micro-operator. Could not confirm whether this is a school/SPED contractor, an NEMT van service, or a sibling/dba of the South Side 'Taylor Services Transportation.' Sub-scale (~5 employees, ~$302K). Chicago is a strategic market for Summit, but this lead needs phone/IL Secretary of State verification before pursuing; low-priority absent confirmation it is a yellow-bus or SPED contract holder.
